sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9234" key="a)nomoio/strofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνομοιό-στροφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting of unequal strophes,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:5:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
